(a) To the extent practicable and to avoid duplication of reporting requirements, the department may combine the reports required under this subchapter with reports required under other provisions of this code.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.810 — Department Information Consolidation

(a) To the extent practicable and to avoid duplication of reporting requirements, the department may combine the reports required under this subchapter with reports required under other provisions of this code.

(b) The department shall develop a central location on the department’s Internet website that provides easily accessible and searchable information to the public contained in the reports required under this subchapter and other provisions of this code.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 24(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*
